variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11800 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11800 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11800 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P150692 Air Filter, Primary Konepac | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11800
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P150692 Air Filter, Primary Konepac is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, primary konepac applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1850 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11800
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1850 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
